title: Meme Craft
description: This mod adds memes into minecraft
body:
This mods adds lots of iconic memes including- Among Us, OIA Cat, Troll Face & more!


Here's how to get them-

## The Basics

First mine a BRAND NEW ore called **Meme Ore** to get a **Meme Gem**.

Next, use the gems and wood to craft an **Meme Station** using this recipe:

![preview1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57773e9fef8d43212c110640cbaec6d1ae3d94f.png)

If you'll attach it to an villager he will become an **Memeger** which will have this trades:

![memeger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d26abf46d476cc9cf3c3b4f4ad4eda2879e992f.png)

## Trades

With the trades you'll get the memes like that:

**OIA Cat**- The trade will give you an **OIA Summomer** _(which definely has a M instead of N on purpose)_ if you'll right click it the **OIA Cat** will get summoned and is a very fast rideable mob, if you kill it you'll get the summomer back.

**Vine Boomer**- The trade will give you the **Vine Boomer** an item when clicked plays the Vine Boom sound (like duh).

**Among Us**- The trade will give you the **Susicator**, which when click will summon the **Among Us** boss. When killed he will drop his knife *Sus Knife* a fast and powerful weapon.

**Troll Face Mask**- The trade will give you the **Troll Face Mask** a funny helmet which looks super cool and is at the level of NETHERITE!

## Other

Make sure to check out my other mods - [Rick's Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/ricks-roll) (definetlly not a rick roll) and [Youtubers](https://modrinth.com/mod/youtubers)
